metadata.description: Marketplace pessoal de plugins Claude Code do Bruno Chiaramonti — developer tools, gestao de projetos, financas pessoais, daily planner, IT tickets.

plugins.name: claude-code-toolkit
plugins.description: Meta-plugin for creating and validating Claude Code commands, skills, agents, hooks, plugins, and marketplaces following official best practices. Includes artifact validation with graded reports, versioning/release automation, and a self-improving research skill that keeps all reference material up-to-date.

plugins.name: forge
plugins.description: Meta-plugin de engenharia de software que guia 8 fases desde a ideia até produção. Inclui 17 skills, 2 agents (Opus) e 6 commands que geram artefatos estruturados — Problem Statement, PRD, User Flows, Wireframes, Design System, Architecture (C4), ADRs, Data Model, Tech Specs, Code Standards, Test Strategy, QA Checklist, Security Baseline, Deploy Strategy e Observability.

plugins.name: service-desk-m7
plugins.description: Create well-structured IT support tickets for M7 systems. Guides users through conversational information gathering and generates formatted markdown tickets for three categories: problem reports, database requests, and new functionality requests.

plugins.name: superavit
plugins.description: Controle financeiro pessoal conversacional. Importa extratos bancários (CSV/OFX/PDF) multi-banco, categoriza transações automaticamente (keywords + Claude fallback), gera relatórios mensais com breakdown por categoria e comparativos MoM, calcula health score financeiro e entrega insights provocativos sobre hábitos de gasto. Persistência via Supabase PostgreSQL.

plugins.name: planner
plugins.description: Personal plugin for Bruno Chiaramonti's executive WEEKLY planning — split into PENSAR vs PERSISTIR. Two skills + one agent: `planning-the-week` (conversational companion — maps sources from Google Calendar + ClickUp, plans the week with executive methodology in dialogue, and runs the `pfeffer-power-analyst` agent for the Insight · cruzamento, emitting a canonical week object) and `writing-week-to-supabase` (deterministic, idempotent upsert of the week's plan/review into the Supabase `bc-planning` project via the `bc-planning_` MCP). Rendering lives in the Next.js front on Vercel — this plugin no longer produces HTML. Scope is strictly personal artifacts.

plugins.name: audio-forge
plugins.description: Geração de áudios longos em PT-BR via Chatterbox Multilingual TTS para reforço de estudos e produção de conteúdo educacional. Estrutura material textual em roteiro segmentado e produz MP3 final consumindo o MCP server chatterbox-mcp.

plugins.name: dev-loop
plugins.description: Loop de desenvolvimento Spec-Driven para projetos com Claude Code, calibrado para os modelos Opus atuais (execution-literal + long-horizon agentic). Executa por tarefa o ciclo Scaffold → Spec → Research → Plan → Implement → Verify. A skill scaffolding-project monta a estrutura padrão Claude Code (CLAUDE.md, CHANGELOG.md, .claude/{settings.json,agents,commands,skills,hooks}, .mcp.json, .gitignore, .dev-loop/.status). Pesquisa via subagents paralelos consolida findings duráveis no CLAUDE.md (memória entre sessões); plano literal é lido como primeira ação por cada subagent executor (anti-drift); verify cruza Acceptance Criteria 1-para-1. 6 skills user-invocable + 2 agents read-only (spec-auditor sonnet, plan-critic opus) + 2 commands. Empacota o MCP oficial do Supabase (HTTP com OAuth).
